name: Sardines
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the sardines from the cans and set aside.
2. Drain the oil from the cans into a large skillet and heat over medium heat.
3. Add the onions, fennel, and garlic to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are very soft but not browned (about 5 minutes).
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Place the onion relish on a platter and keep warm.
6. Add the white wine to the pan and simmer for 2 or 3 minutes.
7. Return the sardines to the skillet and cook until the pan juices coat the top of the relish.
